title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Walmart India Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Store Manager at Walmart India Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Walmart India Holdings Services! We are hiring a Store Manager for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Walmart India Holdings Services:
Walmart India Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Omnichannel Retail
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Referral bonus program
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Walmart India Holdings Services!
